item.title: Aurum Proptech Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Aurum Proptech Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock's medium to long-term outlook. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Repco Home Finance Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Repco Home Finance Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This development highlights a deterioration in the stock’s short- to medium-term momentum, raising concerns about its near-term price trajectory amid already subdued market sentiment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Indo Thai Securities Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Indo Thai Securities Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness ahead. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Barak Valley Cements Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend Ahead
item.description: Barak Valley Cements Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Cement & Cement Products sector, has recently formed a Death Cross—a technical pattern where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average—indicating a potential shift towards a sustained bearish trend and signalling deteriorating momentum for the stock. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Reliance Industries Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Reliance Industries Ltd (Stock ID: 605152) has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum. Investors and market watchers should carefully analyse the implications of this event amid the company’s current financial and market performance. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: The Peria Karamalai Tea & Produce Company Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: The Peria Karamalai Tea & Produce Company Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness in the FMCG sector player’s price trajectory. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Welspun Living Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend Ahead
item.description: Welspun Living Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock's medium to long-term outlook within the Garments & Apparels sector. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Excel Realty N Infra Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Excel Realty N Infra Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Prerna Infrabuild Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Prerna Infrabuild Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Realty sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raises concerns about sustained bearish momentum in the near to medium term. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Universus Photo Imagings Ltd Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: Universus Photo Imagings Ltd has recently formed a Golden Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses above the 200-day moving average. This development suggests a potential bullish breakout and a shift in long-term momentum for the FMCG company, which has already demonstrated strong relative performance against the Sensex over the past year. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Medico Intercontinental Ltd Forms Golden Cross, Indicating Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: Medico Intercontinental Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Trading & Distributors sector, has recently formed a Golden Cross—a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses above the 200-DMA. This development often signals a potential bullish breakout, suggesting a shift in long-term momentum and a possible trend reversal for the stock. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: True Green Bio Energy Ltd Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: True Green Bio Energy Ltd has recently formed a Golden Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) has crossed above the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential bullish breakout and a long-term momentum shift for the stock, suggesting a favourable trend reversal for investors in the Garments & Apparels sector. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Nexus Surgical and Medicare Ltd Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: Nexus Surgical and Medicare Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, has recently formed a Golden Cross—a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses above the 200-day moving average. This development often heralds a bullish breakout, signalling a potential long-term momentum shift and trend reversal for the stock. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Sensex and Nifty Retreat as Banking Sector Leads Declines; Mixed Sectoral Trends Mark Market Session
item.description: Indian equity markets witnessed a sharp correction on 6 March 2026, with the Sensex plunging 1.37% and the Nifty 50 declining 1.27%, dragged down predominantly by heavy losses in the banking sector and mega-cap stocks. Market breadth remained weak as most sectors and indices closed in the red, reflecting cautious investor sentiment amid mixed global cues and subdued domestic triggers. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Sees Mild Correction Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has experienced a modest decline of 0.22% today, extending a recent downtrend that has seen the index fall by 3.07% over the past five trading sessions. Despite pockets of strong performance, the overall market breadth remains weak, signalling cautious investor sentiment amid mixed sectoral trends and shifting technical outlooks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Pressure as BSE MIDCAP 150 Declines Amid Mixed Stock Sentiment
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, has experienced a notable decline over recent sessions, reflecting a cautious investor sentiment amid uneven sectoral contributions and a broad market pullback. The index fell by 0.67% on the day and has contracted by 3.12% over the past five trading days, signalling a period of consolidation after recent gains. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Sees Mixed Performance Amid Defensive and Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced notable pressure in recent sessions, declining by 1.16% on the day and shedding 2.96% over the past five trading days. Despite this broad weakness, select heavyweight stocks have shown resilience, with defensive sectors gaining favour amid a cautious market environment. Time: 5 hours ago
